cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the question is, today is the second day of the third month of 1966. What is the date tomorrow in MM/DD/YYYY format? The options are given as A to E. First, I need to understand what the current date is. The third month is March, right? So the months go January (1st), February (2nd), March (3rd). So the third month is March. And today is the second day of that month. So today is March 2nd, 1966.
